LanguageData.corsaircreed.label: <color=#B7410E>corsair creed</color>
LanguageData.corsaircreed.description: Life under the black signal has burned a ruthless doctrine into bone and nerve. The host strikes fast, fights dirty, and turns every wreck and battlefield into profit for the crew.
LanguageData.corsaircreed_boarder.label: boarding momentum
LanguageData.corsaircreed_boarder.description: Close-quarters boarding drills amplify speed, control, and brutal follow-through.
LanguageData.corsaircreed_gunner.label: deck gunner's eye
LanguageData.corsaircreed_gunner.description: Predatory timing and recoil control sharpen ranged lethality.
LanguageData.corsaircreed_scavenger.label: wreck scavenger instinct
LanguageData.corsaircreed_scavenger.description: Loot-minded reflexes improve hauling, stripping, and rapid battlefield recovery.
LanguageData.corsaircreed_blackflag.label: blackflag audacity
LanguageData.corsaircreed_blackflag.description: A raider's nerve dulls fear and pain, keeping the host aggressive when others would fold.
LanguageData.corsair_broadside_overdrive.label: broadside overdrive
LanguageData.corsair_broadside_overdrive.description: An all-in firing rhythm tuned for short violent exchanges. Accuracy cadence rises, but exposure risk increases.
LanguageData.corsair_plunder_marked.label: marked for plunder
LanguageData.corsair_plunder_marked.description: The target is highlighted as easy loot, disrupting footing and composure under fire.
